attributes.description: Overview of Audit Trail logs in XM Cyber

params.markdown:
**Overview**

The XM Cyber Audit Trail dashboard surfaces a single-pane view of platform activity over time, with breakdowns by event action, event type, and object type to highlight where users are operating and what assets they are touching. Tables of top users, top object names, top source hosts, and top source IPs help analysts quickly identify the busiest operators, the most-targeted entities, and the origins of audit activity. Filters for event subtype, tenant, object type, and event type let teams pivot the dashboard to investigate specific cohorts, detect anomalies, and maintain ongoing audit visibility across their XM Cyber environment.

**[Integration Page](/app/integrations/detail/axonius)**

attributes.title: [Logs XM Cyber] Audit Trail
